name: Inzektor Exa-Stag
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲虫装機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>インゼクター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エクサスタッグ
desc:
2 Level 5 Insect monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls or in their GY; equip that target to this card. This card gains ATK/DEF equal to half the original ATK/DEF of the monster(s) equipped by this effect.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 5 Insect monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls or in their GY; equip that target to this card. This card gains ATK/DEF equal to half the original ATK/DEF of the monster(s) equipped by this effect.
eff:
2 Level 5 Insect monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls or in their GY; equip that target to this card. This card gains ATK/DEF equal to half the original ATK/DEF of the monster(s) equipped by this effect.

action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
Equips monsters from the opponent's Graveyard to itself
